title: viola × mollis
intro: Viola × mollis is a hybrid plant belonging to the violet family, known for its sweet fragrance and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Viola × mollis include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve mood, and support immune function. Viola × mollis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
